Determined to change his life, he moves to Delhi with nothing but dreams and struggles through extreme poverty, self-doubt, and repeated failures while preparing for the UPSC exams. Unlike typical success stories, 12th Fail doesnât glorify achievementâit focuses on the journey, the setbacks, and the courage it takes to keep going when everything seems against you.
